creator: giffunip@asme.org
text:
I took some patches from the NetBSD and Linux camps and the first level
from the Macquarie University. and added them to the port.

How-To-Repeat: FWIW, it would be great if someone takes the time and finds a clean way 
to include the remaining patch levels from the Macquarie University:
http://www.elec.mq.edu.au//cnerf/spice/
